keyPoints: For all: ∀ (applies to every element in the domain)
There exists: ∃ (applies to at least one element in the domain)
Equal to: = (two sets or values are equal)
Not equal to: ≠ (two sets or values are not equal)
Less than: < (one set or value is smaller than another)
Greater than: > (one set or value is larger than another)
Greater than or equal to: ≥ (one set or value is larger than or equal to another)
Less than or equal to: ≤ (one set or value is smaller than or equal to another)
